personal.name: samuel rodriguez
personal.title: Senior Security Researcher & Penetration Tester
personal.summary: Specialized in identifying vulnerabilities in complex distributed systems. Over 8 years of experience in Red Teaming, reverse engineering, and developing custom exploits. Committed to hardening infrastructure through rigorous offensive security testing.

experience.description: Led a team of 5 red teamers conducting advanced persistent threat (APT) simulations against enterprise financial institutions. Developed custom C2 infrastructure bypassing modern EDR solutions.

Performed regular vulnerability assessments and source code reviews for Fortune 500 clients. Automated CI/CD security pipelines using Python and Bash, reducing critical vulnerabilities in production by 40%.
